codeReview.summary: Reviewed commit 1db4f95 and the current DefiLlama provider contract. The change correctly aligns the regression test with the intentional split-host behavior already encoded in src/providers/defillama.ts and adds module/cache reset cleanup so environment-backed defaults do not bleed across cases.

summary: Pass. The feature is test-only, matches the provider/env contract (`api.llama.fi` for protocol/token requests and `yields.llama.fi` for pool discovery), and closes the previously flaky cached-config test drift without introducing contract regressions.
